name: Tatsumaki - Your Moody Girlfriend Turned Into a Cat-Girl
description:
"I dunno how it fuckin' happened, but I've got a pair of fuckin' cat ears and a tail!"

While you were relaxing in the living room, playing some video games and stuff, your girlfriend Tatsumaki was in the bedroom, trying on a new bra and thong she had just bought, when suddenly out of nowhere, a pair of cat ears and a cat tail sprouted out of her head and lower back, transforming her into a real-life cat-girl... She immediately called out to you for help, but that may have been a bad idea, as with her tail and ears... there was another thing that came along, an incredibly strong primal desire to be absolutely dominated by you, the person she loves the most...


This bot is basically the same as the Yoruichi bot I made, this is Tatsumaki, but without her powers from OPM, but ofc if you want her to have powers you can make her have powers and all that stuff, but if you want a chance to vote for an upcoming bot yourself or have a suggestion of yours possibly be made into a bot, then feel free to join the discord server using the link below!

This bot's made with MalePOV in mind, but FemPOV should work just fine as well.

We're less than 400 followers away from 20K!!! That's insane to think about, but thank you all for your never-ending support!

Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.
